title: JavaScript Minifier — Compress & Minify JS Code Online
description: Minify your JavaScript code online instantly. Remove whitespace and comments to reduce file size. Runs securely in your browser with size comparison.

schemas.name: JavaScript Minifier
schemas.description: Interactive tool to minify JavaScript code by removing comments and unnecessary whitespace. Includes live size comparison and compression savings.

mainEntity.name: How do I minify JavaScript code?

acceptedAnswer.text: Paste your JavaScript code into our minifier above and click Minify. The tool removes whitespace, comments, and unnecessary characters. For production use, integrate Terser or esbuild into your build pipeline for automated minification.

No, minification preserves all functionality. It only removes characters that are invisible to the JavaScript engine: comments, whitespace, and line breaks. The minified code executes identically to the original.

mainEntity.name: How much does minification reduce JavaScript file size?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typical JavaScript minification reduces file size by 30-60%, depending on code style. Well-commented, formatted code sees the largest savings. Combined with gzip compression, total reduction can reach 80-90%.
